query:
-- Check conversation 330620 messages breakdown
SELECT messageType, content, fromMe, timestamp
FROM messages
WHERE waConversationId = 330620
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Check if there are any non-template messages
SELECT messageType, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM messages
WHERE waConversationId = 330620
GROUP BY messageType;
